scripts.dev: docker compose up -d db && npx concurrently -n "server,client" -c "blue,green" "cd server && go run cmd/server/main.go" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.lint: echo '--- Linting Client ---' && (cd client && npm run lint) && echo '--- Linting Server ---' && (cd server && golangci-lint run --fix)
